channel.title: Releases on Layer5 Documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on Layer5 Documentation

item.title: v1.0.11-1
item.description:
What’s New 🔗

🔤 General 🔗

  • UI: Adjust Zoom icon ViewBox @leecalcote (#4166)
  • test: enable one retry in CI for e2e flakiness resilience @leecalcote (#4168)

🧰 Maintenance 🔗

  • test(e2e): fix CI timeout failures — raise timeout, halve workers, decouple XState wait @leecalcote (#4176)
  • Fix copy, paste, and duplicate hotkeys in Kanvas Designer @leecalcote (#4167)
  • CI: Block PR gate until remote E2E tests complete @leecalcote (#4175)

👨🏽‍💻 Contributors 🔗

Thank you to our contributors for making this release possible: @l5io, @leecalcote and @ritzorama

item.title: v1.0.8-2
item.description:
What’s Changed 🔗

  • ci: set KANVAS_TIMEOUT_MULTIPLIER for Docker-based e2e tests by @leecalcote in https://github.com/layer5labs/meshery-extensions-packages/pull/690
  • fix: gracefully handle single-shard E2E test runs by @leecalcote in https://github.com/layer5labs/meshery-extensions-packages/pull/691
  • fix: pin upload-artifact to v4 and use find for shard outcome discovery by @leecalcote in https://github.com/layer5labs/meshery-extensions-packages/pull/692

Full Changelog: https://github.com/layer5labs/meshery-extensions-packages/compare/v1.0.7-2...v1.0.8-2

item.title: v1.0.8-1
item.description:
What’s Changed 🔗

  • fix: pin upload-artifact to v4 and use find for shard outcome discovery by @leecalcote in https://github.com/layer5labs/meshery-extensions-packages/pull/692

item.title: v1.0.7-2
item.description:
What’s New 🔗

🔤 General 🔗

  • [React 19] Fix hooks ordering violations and ref misuse @leecalcote (#4160)
  • chore(deps): remove unused @babel/eslint-* packages @leecalcote (#4153)
  • docs: expand E2E test README with framework assessment and profiles @leecalcote (#4161)

🕸️ Operator 🔗

  • Fix Golang Plugin k8s deps compatibility @leecalcote (#4162)

📖 Documentation 🔗

  • docs: consolidate tests/README.md into developer guide @leecalcote (#4164)
  • Document performance review of autopan extension @leecalcote (#4147)

👨🏽‍💻 Contributors 🔗

Thank you to our contributors for making this release possible: @aabidsofi19, @l5io, @leecalcote and @yi-nuo426

item.title: v1.0.6-2
item.description:
What’s New 🔗

🔤 General 🔗

  • Fix proxy-revoked crash \Cannot perform ‘get’ on a proxy that has been revoked\ @leecalcote (#4152)
  • Fix make targets that use sibling-repo relative paths for git worktree support @leecalcote (#4150)
  • Fix z-index for newly created components and GraphQL worktrees @leecalcote (#4149)
  • fix(operator): plainify draft refs in saveView and updateViewRoute @leecalcote (#4144)
  • Fix z-index for newly created components appearing below existing ones @copilot-swe-agent[bot] (#3915)
  • sistent 18.4 and test updates @marblom007 (#4133)
  • test: add unit tests for adaptive mode actors, model, and guidance @marblom007 (#4123)
  • test: add unit tests for render mode constants, thresholds, and integration @marblom007 (#4122)
  • test: add unit tests for render mode styles, badges, and features @marblom007 (#4121)
  • feat: add user guidance system for performance optimization suggestions @leecalcote (#4115)
  • feat: implement View Only render mode @leecalcote (#4116)
  • fix: wire adaptive mode event pipeline between actors (#3923) @leecalcote (#4118)
  • feat: add adaptive mode toggle to RenderModeSwitcher UI @leecalcote (#4114)
  • feat: add performance monitor actor for render latency sampling @leecalcote (#4112)
  • perf: compound node rendering optimizations @marblom007 (#4124)
  • feat: add adaptive mode actor for automatic render mode switching @leecalcote (#4113)
  • feat: wire adaptive mode pipeline and add transition polish @leecalcote (#4117)
  • Add performance monitor actor for render latency sampling @marblom007 (#4130)
  • test: skip flaky duplicate-evaluation e2e test @leecalcote (#4119)
  • fix: add explicit markup prop to Mention for React 19 compatibility @arjunmehta-git (#4127)
  • fix: lazy-init edge handle tooltip to survive Cytoscape mount race @marblom007 (#4125)
  • test: stabilize canvas node selection @marblom007 (#4126)
  • feat: implement medium render mode as distinct middle tier @leecalcote (#4110)
  • fix: correct guard condition in design validation event publisher @leecalcote (#4120)
  • feat: complete wireframe mode rendering @leecalcote (#4111)
  • Susan is kaput. fix: resolve XState actor communication error in validation @arjunmehta-git (#4104)
  • feat: expand render mode type system for adaptive transitions @leecalcote (#4109)
  • fix: align Help Center grid cards @arjunmehta-git (#4105)
  • test: improve duplicate component evaluation test reliability @arjunmehta-git (#4103)

🖌️ Designer 🔗

  • Refactor ActionToolbar for mobile actions and cleanup @fitzergerald (#4140)
  • fix: replace @syncedstore/core with immer-yjs to fix collaboration state corruption @marblom007 (#4131)

🐛 Bug Fixes 🔗

  • Fix Component style editing tooltip not showing up @aabidsofi19 (#4156)
  • fix(tests): fail Playwright auth setup fast on invalid credentials @leecalcote (#4155)
  • chore(deps): bump @sistent/sistent 0.18.3 → 0.18.4 @leecalcote (#4151)
  • fix(sweettea): harden actor lifecycle safety across store layer @leecalcote (#4142)
  • fix: replace @syncedstore/core with immer-yjs to fix collaboration state corruption @marblom007 (#4131)

🧰 Maintenance 🔗

  • improvement(tests): faster and more precise Playwright E2E execution @leecalcote (#4146)
  • build: clean up residual webpack references after rspack migration @leecalcote (#4129)

📖 Documentation 🔗

  • docs: refresh Kanvas Developer Guide for current codebase @leecalcote (#4145)
  • chore: remove dead @layer5/cytoscape-node-html-label dependency @marblom007 (#4134)
  • build: clean up residual webpack references after rspack migration @leecalcote (#4129)

👨🏽‍💻 Contributors 🔗

Thank you to our contributors for making this release possible: @aabidsofi19, @arjunmehta-git, @fitzergerald, @hortison, @jamieplu, @l5io, @leecalcote, @marblom007, @miacycle, @simihablo, @winkletinkle, @yi-nuo426 and copilot-swe-agent[bot]

item.title: v1.0.6-1
item.description:
What’s New 🔗

🔤 General 🔗

  • Fix TypeError when catalog_data is undefined in Catalog modal @arjunmehta-git (#4102)
  • update @arjunmehta-git (#4101)
  • fix: harden XState actor guards against null data crashes @arjunmehta-git (#4100)
  • Remove axios dependency and deduplicate RTK endpoints @arjunmehta-git (#4097)
  • docs: rewrite AGENTS.md for coding agent relevance @arjunmehta-git (#4094)
  • build: replace webpack with rspack @yi-nuo426 (#4084)

🖌️ Designer 🔗

  • fix: improve mobile responsiveness and touch navigation @arjunmehta-git (#4095)
  • simplify @arjunmehta-git (#4098)
  • fix build issues @arjunmehta-git (#4093)

🐛 Bug Fixes 🔗

  • fix: improve mobile responsiveness and touch navigation @arjunmehta-git (#4095)
  • Fix React runtime bundling mismatch in Kanvas @arjunmehta-git (#4099)
  • .patternFile @arjunmehta-git (#4096)
  • Fix feedback React import and logo SVG sizing @yi-nuo426 (#4083)
  • fix build issues @arjunmehta-git (#4093)
  • test: stabilize follow-up E2E interactions @marblom007 (#4092)

👨🏽‍💻 Contributors 🔗

Thank you to our contributors for making this release possible: @arjunmehta-git, @hortison, @l5io, @leecalcote, @marblom007 and @yi-nuo426

item.title: v1.0.1-1
item.description:

🔤 General 🔗

  • enhanced test env defaults @yi-nuo426 (#4064)
  • fix duplicate element test @leecalcote (#4063)

🖌️ Designer 🔗

  • fix: use isRejectedWithValue for 510 error check in middleware @leecalcote (#4059)

🕸️ Operator 🔗

  • fix: use isRejectedWithValue for 510 error check in middleware @leecalcote (#4059)
  • fix: remove console.log debug code from mesheryErrorMiddleware @alexquincy (#4057)
  • chore: upgrade to meshery/schemas v1.0.1, sistent v0.18.1, meshkit v1.0.1 @leecalcote (#4048)

🐛 Bug Fixes 🔗

  • Fix syncedStore Immer import @yi-nuo426 (#4065)
  • fix: detect local Meshery lockfile from worktrees @leecalcote (#4060)
  • Resolve catalog modal issue @Rajesh-Nagarajan-11 (#4035)

🧰 Maintenance 🔗

  • chore: use sparse checkout for meshery release sync @yi-nuo426 (#4068)
  • fix: sync graphql go.mod to Meshery release tag before Docker build @leecalcote (#4062)
  • Bump typescript-eslint from 8.57.2 to 8.58.0 in /meshmap @dependabot[bot] (#4045)
  • Bump @microlink/react-json-view from 1.31.3 to 1.31.15 in /meshmap @dependabot[bot] (#4046)

👨🏽‍💻 Contributors 🔗

Thank you to our contributors for making this release possible: @Copilot, @Rajesh-Nagarajan-11, @aabidsofi19, @alexquincy, @arjunmehta-git, @dependabot[bot], @l5io, @leecalcote, @ritzorama, @simihablo, @yi-nuo426 and dependabot[bot]
